title: Codex adversarial review of full dashboard diff
description: Launch codex with fresh-context adversarial reviewer prompt. Focus: race conditions in sessions.db, SSE memory leaks, federation HMAC handling, terminalLauncher shell injection, summary prompt injection. Fix all critical + major findings before ship.

context.text: Fresh-context Codex adversarial review completed via CODEX_HOME=/Users/luke/.codex-pole codex exec -m gpt-5.4. Reviewed the dashboard diff focus areas requested by the task: sessions.db races, SSE cleanup/leaks, federation HMAC handling, terminal launcher injection surface, summary prompt-injection surfaces, and the T-DASH-016 federation real-peer polling fix. Result: no blockers. Earlier review findings on T-DASH-016 were fixed before this final review: HMAC negative cases, SSE event proof, sort assertions, jump launch assertion, real peer polling, and /fed/dashboard/state account-refresh degradation. Verification from prior committed task remains green: npm run build; npm run test:e2e:dashboard; npm test -- --runInBand; npm run typecheck:dashboard; npm audit --audit-level=moderate; swift build --package-path macos-menubar/SweechBar; git diff --check.
